2002February 25, 2002

🇺🇸 Myrtle Beach, SC, USA

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Myrtle Beach, United States, February 25, 2002 -- March 1, 2002

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2002-03-myrtle-beach-sc-usa

10 Resolutions

528Plenary
Present ISO 3098 clarifications to ISO/TC 10/SC 1
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 requests that the ISO/TC 10/SC 1 Liaison representative present the ISO 3098 clarifications identified in ISO/TC 184/SC 4/WG 12 N1016 for consideration at the next ISO/TC 10/SC 1 me...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
527Plenary
Accept IMTF report and disband task force
SC 4 accepts the Report of the Integrated Manufacturing Task Force (IMTF) including all the correlating documents presented, and requests its Secretariat to circulate the final results to P-members.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
526Plenary
Establish comment resolution procedure for Technical Specifications
SC 4 agrees that the following procedure shall be applied to the resolution of comments submitted against successful Technical Specification ballots. 1) Resolution of comments shall be agreed with ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
525Plenary
Appoint David Loffredo as WG 11 Convenor
SC 4 appoints David Loffredo to serve as Convenor of its Working Group 11 for a period of three years.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
524Plenary
Permit three-month ballot cycle for CD and TS ballots
SC 4 directs the PPC to modify the SC 4 Handbook and the appropriate guidelines to permit a three-month ballot cycle for the CD and TS ballots of SC 4 standards. A longer ballot period may be reque...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
523Plenary
Approve new project leaders and editors
SC 4 approves the following new project leaders or project editors for the associated SC 4 projects: |=== |Project |Leader |Editor |ISO 10303-28e2 |Joe Trausch |Thomas Liebich |ISO 10303-51 |David ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"

Acclamation

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its deep appreciation to Mr. Peter Müller, Chairman ISO/TC 184/SC 1, for his participation. SC 4 expresses a special thank you to our the SC 4 Liaison Plenary presenters Peter Müller...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its appreciation to those who participated for their outstanding contributions and professionalisms this week to the work of ISO/TC 184/SC 4.

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 wishes to congratulate Tim Turner (WG 3/T23 - Shipbuilding) and Christy Haas on their wedding last November. SC 4 is delighted to have provided the opportunity for the happy couple to meet and...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
